title: Better Copper Golems
description: Unleash the true power of copper golems!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c441cf4258b0bc1f39b0055239c142885c3425.png)
# Unleash the true power of Copper Golems! ⚡

Transform your Copper Golems into truly **versatile, efficient, and intelligent companions**.  
**Unlocks their full potential** and makes them a core part of your automation and storage systems.

## ✨ Key Features
- **Supercharged Efficiency - x64 Items**  
  Golems can now carry **entire stacks of 64 items** (instead of just 16). That’s **4x the capacity** for faster and smoother item management!  

- **Smarter Storage Interaction**  
  No more chest-only limitations. Copper Golems can now **interact seamlessly with Barrels and Shulker Boxes**, giving you flexible storage options.
